rationale: Reviewer 'claude_cli:claude-opus-4-6' recommended 'major_revision'. Confidence=0.82. Weaknesses to address: The core prediction — throughput scales linearly up to 32k tokens — was never tested. All results are at seq_len=512, three orders of magnitude below the claimed regime.; Approximation error is severe: relative L2 error of 0.767 with verdict 'inconclusive'. The paper's own problem_statement acknowledges existing linear approximations 'lose accuracy' — this result suggests the proposed method has the same flaw.; No downstream task accuracy reported. Speed without quality is not a contribution; the accuracy-speed tradeoff is uncharacterized.

next_experiments.rationale: Run the scaling sweep to 32k tokens and demonstrate linear throughput scaling — this is the single required prediction and it is entirely untested.
